I wrote you a letter...

My Jassiiii, Happy birthday. I love you so so much. 🌸

tap to open ✦

🎀
🌸
Your birthday, 2025 🎂 My dearest Jassiiii,

Okay so. You're 23. 23!! Omg yaar, honestly. I still think of you as that person from college — the one I didn't immediately click with (lol, look at us now) — and somehow you became one of the most important people in my life.

We've been through so many fallouts, so much chaos, so many dramatic phases — and every single time, we came back to each other. The hospital. The 3am calls. Hyderabad. Bhopal just the two of us. All of it. Everything that only makes sense to us.

Right now I know office has been terrible, and I genuinely hate that I can't just be there physically and make it better. But — you are one of the strongest people I know. Not in a motivational poster way. In the real way. You handle things that would break most people and you still show up, still laugh, still be your wonderful ridiculous self.

It's been over a year. An entire year. Me in Pune, you in Gurgaon — or Noida? Still confused lol — and sometimes days go by without us talking and I think about you way more than I say. I'm sorry for the silences.

But Bangalore is coming. The flat, the cafe hopping, the clubs, the shopping, Goa. I know it will happen. I really do.

I love you bhai. I miss you every single day. And please never think you'll bother me — you won't. Not ever. Happy Birthday, my person. May 23 be everything. 🥂

your Sheru 🌸

1500+ KM

NOIDA?Jassi is here (I still don't know lol) 💛
Over a year. No meeting. No hugs. Sometimes days go by without us talking — and I hate that more than I let on. But you're still the first person I want to tell everything to. That's just us.
🌆 THE BANGALORE PLAN — no debates, it's happening.
🏠 Our own flat — separate rooms obv
☕ Cafe hopping every weekend
🛍️ Shopping trips always
🎬 Movie nights at home
💃 Going to clubs and dancing
🌊 Goa... wink wink 😉
✨ Having the time of our lives

HAPPY
BIRTH
DAY

twenty — three ✨

May this year bring you everything you've been quietly wishing for.
May that office situation sort itself out — you deserve a place that actually sees you.
May the Bangalore flat happen. May we dance until 4am. May Goa happen. May all of it happen.
May you always know how genuinely, completely, madly loved you are.
and one last thing...
I really, really miss you.
Like genuinely. Every single day.
I miss you so much, Jassiiii. 💛

so there's only one thing left to do —

📞 VIDEO CALL ME. RIGHT NOW.

I'm closer than you think. 🌸

Happy Birthday Jassiiii 🌸
— your Sheru, always
